overview.description: The NEOS Enhanced Income Aggregate Bond ETF (BNDI) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in investment grade fixed income. The fund is an actively managed fund that invests in a diversified portfolio of fixed income securities with varying maturities and credit ratings while utilizing a US large-cap put-spread strategy. BNDI was launched on Aug 30, 2022 and is issued by Neos.
